message.content: {"items":[{"title":"German General Social Survey – ALLBUS 2018 (includes historical retrospective questions covering German Reich era)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA5270","justification":"Contains modules asking respondents about historical evaluations of the German Reich period; useful for studying how the 1910s–1930s are remembered in German history and political culture, even though data are contemporary."},{"title":"Historical election data for the German Reichstag 1871–1912","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8013","justification":"Provides constituency-level election results for Reichstag elections up to 1912 in the German Reich, directly covering political history and electoral behavior in the 1910s."},{"title":"Weimarer Republik: Reichstagswahlen 1919–1933 (Weimar Republic Reichstag Elections)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8014","justification":"Contains detailed election results for all Reichstag elections from 1919 to 1933, covering the Weimar Republic period and the rise of the NSDAP in the 1920s and early 1930s."},{"title":"International Institute of Social History / GESIS – Sozialhistorische Daten zur deutschen Arbeiterbewegung (Social History of the German Labour Movement)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8148","justification":"Includes quantitative series on trade unions, parties and associations in the German Reich and Weimar Republic, covering labour and social history from the late 19th century through the 1930s."},{"title":"Wirtschafts- und Sozialstatistik für das Deutsche Reich 1871–1939 (Economic and Social Statistics for the German Reich)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8149","justification":"Time series on population, employment, production and other indicators for the German Reich from 1871 to 1939, allowing analysis of structural developments in the 1910s, 1920s, and 1930s."},{"title":"Historische Wahldaten Deutschlands (German Historical Election Data, 1871–1990)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8012","justification":"Compiled historical election dataset including the German Empire and Weimar Republic; covers Reichstag and later elections, supporting research on political history across 1910s–1930s."},{"title":"Preußische Landtagswahlen 1919–1933 (Prussian State Parliament Elections)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8145","justification":"Election results for the Prussian Landtag in the Weimar period, key for studying regional political history within the German Reich’s largest state during the 1920s and early 1930s."},{"title":"Kommunalwahlen im Deutschen Reich 1919–1933 (Municipal Elections in the German Reich)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8150","justification":"Collection of local election results across municipalities in the German Reich during the Weimar Republic, relevant for fine-grained political and social history in the 1920s–1930s."},{"title":"Historische Gemeindedaten Deutschlands 1925–1987 (Historical Municipality Data)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8146","justification":"Provides demographic and socio-structural indicators at municipality level, starting with the 1925 census, enabling historical analyses of settlement and social patterns in late Weimar Germany."},{"title":"Kriegsopfer, Kriegsbeschädigte und Hinterbliebene im Deutschen Reich 1914–1923","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8055","justification":"Focuses on war casualties, disabled veterans and dependents in the German Reich, directly documenting the social consequences of World War I during the mid‑1910s and early 1920s."}]}
